{% extends "marketplace/vendor/base.html" %} {% block title %}我的商品 - {{ vendor.company_name }}{% endblock %} {% block nav_products %}active{% endblock %} {% block extra_vendor_css %} .badge-active { background: rgba(16,185,129,0.12); color: #10b981; font-weight: 600; } .badge-inactive { background: rgba(239,68,68,0.12); color: #ef4444; font-weight: 600; } .stock-low { color: #ef4444; font-weight: 600; } .stock-ok { color: #10b981; } /* Product thumbnail — bulletproof sizing */ .prod-thumb { width: 48px !important; height: 48px !important; min-width: 48px !important; max-width: 48px !important; min-height: 48px !important; max-height: 48px !important; object-fit: cover; border-radius: 10px; flex-shrink: 0; display: block; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.08); } .prod-thumb-placeholder { width: 48px !important; height: 48px !important; min-width: 48px; border-radius: 10px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--primary-color), var(--secondary-color)); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-shrink: 0; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.8); font-size: 1.1rem; } .product-name { font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.92rem; color: #1e293b; max-width: 220px; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; } .product-sku { font-size: 0.78rem; color: #94a3b8; } /* Metrics pills */ .metric-pill { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; background: #f8fafc; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 20px; padding: 5px 14px; font-size: 0.82rem; color: #64748b; font-weight: 500; } .metric-pill strong { color: #1e293b; font-weight: 700; } .metric-pill i { font-size: 0.75rem; } .metric-pill.active i { color: #10b981; } .metric-pill.sales i { color: #f59e0b; } .metric-pill.stock i { color: #06b6d4; } /* Table refinements */ .table td { font-size: 0.9rem; padding: 12px 15px !important; } .table th { padding: 14px 15px !important; } .action-btns { display: flex; gap: 6px; align-items: center; } {% endblock %} {% block vendor_content %}
